mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(t.id + 1), 1) FROM (SELECT 0 AS id UNION ALL SELECT id FROM posts) t LEFT JOIN posts t2 ON t.id + 1 = t2.id WHERE t2.id IS NULL
INSERT INTO posts (id, author, title, content, category, created_at, view_count, like_count) VALUES (#{id}, #{author}, #{title}, #{content}, #{category}, NOW(), 0, 0)

INSERT INTO post_files (post_id, original_file_name, stored_file_name, file_path) VALUES
(#{file.postId}, #{file.originalFileName}, #{file.storedFileName}, #{file.filePath})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, category = #{category}, edited_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (post_id, parent_id, author, content, created_at) VALUES (#{postId}, #{parentId}, #{author}, #{content}, #{createdAt})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM post_likes WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND user_ip = #{userIp}
mapper.select: SELECT like_count FROM posts WHERE id = #{postId}
